quotes: default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds

Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency of brand iconography while meeting minimum visibility thresholds for low-vision users.
rules.rule_text: Icons must follow a minimal line illustration style with consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work. New icons are permitted but must match this approach. Under baseline email rules, icons must be at least 32×32px (dimension.accessibility.icon_render_min = 32px) and use default Brand Blue strokes (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) on light backgrounds to ensure sufficient contrast and scale for low-vision audiences.
